The '''''[[Solar Grazer]]''''' was the personal [[Starship/Legends|ship]] of the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Rooty]]. The craft was a heavily modified [[VR-10 Cuirilla-Rayl Xylines-class spacetug|VR-10 ''Cuirilla-Rayl Xylines''-class space tug]] and was used for short range runs through [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]]. Although the craft was not designed for having weapons or a [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]], Rooty was able to install a short-range hyperdrive along with two [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser turrets]] and a [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]]. Although the smuggler used the ship sparingly, it fell into disrepair under Rooty's possession and began to slowly fall apart.
